supply_chain.dependencies: Cintas sources finished products from many outside suppliers and operates five manufacturing facilities that provide for standard uniform needs. Cintas purchases fabric used in manufacturing from several suppliers.
supply_chain.risks: Supply chain constraints and macroeconomic conditions including inflationary pressures; fluctuations in costs of materials and labor; inability to find qualified suppliers who meet standards; political and economic stability in countries where foreign suppliers are located; financial stability of suppliers; suppliers' failure to meet supplier standards; labor problems experienced by suppliers; availability of raw materials to suppliers; currency exchange rates; transport availability and cost; inflation; U.S. and foreign trade policies; tariffs and other impositions on imported goods; trade sanctions imposed on certain countries; limitation on importation of certain types of goods

regulatory_risks: Compliance with federal and state regulations including employment laws and regulations
Data privacy and protection laws and regulations
Changes in laws, regulations and related interpretations
New laws or regulations enacted by current U.S. presidential administration and Congress
Increasing levels of regulation and disclosure requirements with respect to sustainability matters
Environmental laws and regulations relating to protection of environment and health and safety matters
Laws governing discharges of pollutants to air and water
Management and disposal of hazardous substances and wastes
Superfund Amendments and Reauthorization Act of 1986
Increasingly complex and changing laws and regulations regarding privacy, data protection and data security
Laws related to collection, storage, use, transmission and protection of personal information and other consumer, customer, vendor or employee data
Changes in income tax laws including Inflation Reduction Act (IRA)
Excise tax on repurchase of corporate stock

sanction_risks: Trade sanctions imposed on certain countries
U.S. and foreign trade policies, tariffs and other impositions on imported goods
